questionHtml: Referring to the data, compare and contrast the changes in the use of the different fuels between 1950 and 1975.
markschemeHtml: [Source: Boden T ; Marland G ; Andres R J (1999): Global, Regional, and National Fossil-Fuel CO2 Emissions (1751 - 2014) (V. 2017). Carbon Dioxide Information Analysis Center (CDIAC), Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL), Oak Ridge, TN (United States). doi:10.3334/ CDIAC/00001_V2017]

meta.title: Referring to the data, compare and contrast the changes in the use of the different fuels between 1950 and 1975.
